ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS IS GRANTED. MR. GARCIA IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER MARKING THE BOX THAT INDICATES "EFFECTIVE UPON THE FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THIS SIGNED ORDER UPON THE CLIENT", AND THAT REFLECTS ALL CONTACT INFORMATION FOR MS. ENCINAS AND ALL FUTURE HEARING DATES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Self Represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jan-10-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Robert Garcia telephone number 415-648-3060 for Plaintiff Irma Encinas.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Ms. Encinas or anyone on her behalf were not present. Attorney Robert Garcia's MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS is granted. Mr. Garcia is to prepare an order marking the box that indicates "effective upon the filing of the proof of service of this signed order upon the Client", and that reflects all contact information for Ms. Encinas and all future hearing dates.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
